2191340.name: Impasto Soundtrack
2191340.description:
The Impasto soundtrack was created in collaboration with composer William Bourassa Bennett and composer/singer Marina Ortega Mira. All proceeds from this soundtrack will go directly to them.

All of the songs found below have been specially remastered for this release.

Songs are in MP3 format, and will be placed in the Steam directory:
...Steam\steamapps\music\Impasto Soundtrack
